title: Creamy Chicken Mediterranean Bisque
description: A rich and comforting soup that combines the flavors of the Mediterranean with the velvety texture of a bisque. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the chicken stock and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Stir in the milk and cream until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with crumbled feta cheese, kalamata olives, and pine nuts.
Optional: Add a sprinkle of paprika on top for a pop of color.
